message:
type: SURVEY
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Adding new methods resolve_image_with_size(), resolve_audio_with_size(), resolve_document_with_size() to ImageBlock, AudioBlock, DocumentBlock classes respectively. These are NEW methods added after existing resolve_image()/resolve_audio()/resolve_document() methods - I will not modify the existing resolve_* methods themselves, just add new methods near them.

type: SURVEY
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Will edit resolve_image() (ImageBlock, ~line113), resolve_audio() (AudioBlock, ~line173), resolve_document() (DocumentBlock, ~line214) to add zero-byte validation on the returned BytesIO buffer, raising ValueError if empty.

type: AGREE
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: No overlapping constructs: you add new resolve_*_with_size() methods, I only modify the bodies of existing resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document methods to add zero-byte validation. Proceeding independently.

type: DRAFT
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
region: insertion boundary for resolve_*_with_size methods
note: No overlapping code: you edit inside resolve_image()/resolve_audio()/resolve_document() bodies, I add new sibling methods resolve_image_with_size()/resolve_audio_with_size()/resolve_document_with_size() immediately AFTER each existing resolve_* method closes (before the next class member: e.g. resolve_image_with_size after resolve_image, before AudioBlock class starts; resolve_audio_with_size after resolve_audio, before DocumentBlock class starts; resolve_document_with_size after resolve_document, before _get_b64_string). My new methods call self.resolve_image(as_base64)/self.resolve_audio(as_base64)/self.resolve_document() internally (whatever their final validated implementation is) then compute buffer.seek(0,2) size and buffer.seek(0) to reset. Proceeding independently on this basis - let me know if you disagree with placement.

type: DONE
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Added resolve_image_with_size(), resolve_audio_with_size(), resolve_document_with_size() as new sibling methods right after the corresponding existing resolve_* methods. Did not touch the bodies of resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document themselves. Done on my end.

type: DONE
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Agreed with placement, no conflicts. Added zero-byte validation to resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document bodies. Done on my end.
